/usr/local/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libQtColorWidgetsPlugin-Qt52.so.2 -o libQtColorWidgetsPlugin-Qt52.so.2.0.0 CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/QtColorWidgetsPlugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_preview_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_wheel_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_widget_plugin_collection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/gradient_slider_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/hue_slider_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_selector_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_list_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/swatch_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_palette_widget_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_2d_slider_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtColorWidgetsPlugin.dir/color_line_edit_plugin.cpp.o -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhangfq/Method-II/HydrogenOrbitalViewer/colorPicker/Qt-Color-Widgets/color_widgets_designer_plugin ../libQtColorWidgets-Qt52.so.2.0.0 /usr/lib64/libQt5Designer.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Widgets.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Gui.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Xml.so.5.9.2 /usr/lib64/libQt5Core.so.5.9.2
